title: 3rd Israel-Lebanon Washington talks begin May 14 — military reps for first time, Ron Dermer/Simon Karam lead
snippet: Third round of Israel-Lebanon peace talks in Washington on May 14-15. First time military representatives from both sides participate. Israeli delegation led by Ron Dermer, Lebanese delegation by Simon Karam. Focus on concrete measures to disarm Hezbollah. Coincides with Trump-Xi Beijing summit.
tag_reason: 3rd round talks opening on 5/14, follow-up to tracking item but significant new development
